user.title: Battery Dispatch Advisor
user.description: Select your electricity price sensor and configure your battery. Zendure entities are optional — when provided, limits and SoC are read live from your device to improve schedule accuracy. The integration never writes to your device.

data.power: Max charge/discharge power (kW) — fallback if Zendure not set
data.min_soc: Min SoC % — fallback if Zendure not set
data.max_soc: Max SoC % — fallback if Zendure not set
data.min_profit: Minimum cycle profit (EUR/kWh) — skip cycles with a smaller buy/sell spread
data.return_price_formula: Return price formula (variable: current_price in EUR/MWh)

error.soc_range_invalid: Min SoC must be lower than Max SoC.

abort.already_configured: This price sensor is already configured.

data.power: Max charge/discharge power (kW) — fallback if Zendure not set
data.min_soc: Min SoC % — fallback if Zendure not set
data.max_soc: Max SoC % — fallback if Zendure not set
data.return_price_formula: Return price formula (variable: current_price in EUR/MWh)

error.soc_range_invalid: Min SoC must be lower than Max SoC.
